title: bupleurum rotundifolium var. protractum
intro: Bupleurum rotundifolium var. protractum, also known as Chinese kuding, is a type of flowering plant in the genus Bupleurum, native to China and the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum rotundifolium var. protractum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Traditionally, the leaves and stems of this plant are used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to promote digestion, reduce stress, and enhance overall well-being.
